answer: Delivery takes 10-14 days from order to Lusaka pickup. We'll update you at each step: ordered in China → in transit → arrived Zambia warehouse → ready for pickup.
Our Lusaka pickup point is at Manda Hill Shopping Centre, near the taxi rank. Open Mon-Sat 9am-6pm. Full address sent with your pickup code.
We accept Airtel Money for deposits and balance. Send 30% deposit to our merchant number (provided at checkout), then we place your order from China. Balance is due on pickup.
All items ship from our verified suppliers in China via air freight. Everything is quality-checked at our Guangzhou warehouse before flying to Lusaka.
If your item arrives damaged or wrong, we offer a full refund within 7 days. Please send a photo of the issue via WhatsApp and we'll assist immediately.
